achievements.title: AI for Good Hackathon (University at Buffalo)
achievements.detail: Ranked in the Top 10 among 200+ participating teams for building a sustainability-focused AI solution designed to improve ESG scoring workflows. The project combined problem framing, rapid prototyping, and model-backed decision support in a time-constrained hackathon setting, with emphasis on practical usability and measurable social impact.

achievements.title: Automated Decision Making Research
achievements.detail: Developed and evaluated automated monitoring and drift-detection workflows for industrial decision systems, improving pipeline stability by 30%. Designed targeted quality-control checks and threshold-based alerts that reduced manual review effort by 40%, enabling faster anomaly response and more reliable model-assisted operations in production-oriented environments.

publication.title: A Data-Driven Approach for Reference Evapotranspiration Forecasting: Merging Weather Forecasts with Persistence-based Approaches
publication.journal: Agricultural and Forest Meteorology / Journal of Hydrology
